chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1394 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.9079/2025 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 4 a/w reply of Counsel thereof as at A 3. For orders on CMA No.8868/2025 4. For orders on CMA No.8869/2025 5. For hearing of main case 15.12.2025 None present. --------- None present for the petitioner. Same was the positon on the last date of hearing. It appears the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, therefore, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss it for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE Nadir*
